data: Fragment of a small limestone base, preserving the right and lower edges. Part of upper cornice is preserved and with above the remains of the paws/feet of a relief scuplture. The inscription on the recessed face below (7cm high).
Three lines of Greek immediately below the cornice on the face.
Chance find in September 1965 in Contrada Manicalunga, north side of the Timpone Nero necropolis.
I.Sicily with the permission of the Assessorato Regionale dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana - Dipartimento dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana; photo V. Mignosa 13.01.2022
Partially reopened following extensive restoration work. Comprehensive collection of archaeological material, predominantly from the West of the island, with an important Etruscan collection.
Centre of Palermo, Piazza Olivella 24, 90100 - Palermo
Iscrizioni greche lapidarie del Museo di Palermo

W. Peek, ‘Grabepigramm aus Selinus’, Zeitschrift für Papyrologie und Epigraphik 23 (1976): 93–94
Iscrizioni Greche Archaiche di Sicilia e Magna Grecia. Iscrizioni di Sicilia. I. Iscrizioni di Megara Iblea e Selinunte
